pr-evidence/validate-wheel-record-manife.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially found that unrecorded wheel members could pass RECORD validation; after patching all-file coverage and regression tests, the reviewer approved with no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Release bundles now validate wheel RECORD manifests for required metadata, complete file coverage, and matching hash/size fields.
Wheel tests now generate realistic RECORD fixtures and reject missing, empty, incomplete, tampered, and unrecorded-package-file manifests.
pr-evidence/validate-wheel-record-manife.why: Strict V1 release bundles should only bless package wheels whose install manifest covers every shipped file with provenance.
